pub fn handle_event(event: &Event) {
    match event.kind {
        EventKind::Message => process_message(event),
        EventKind::Error => process_error(event),
        _ => unimplemented!(),
    }
}

pub fn encode(data: &[u8], format: Format) -> Vec<u8> {
    match format {
        Format::Json => serde_json::to_vec(data).unwrap(),
        Format::Binary => data.to_vec(),
        Format::Xml => unimplemented!("XML encoding not yet supported"),
    }
}

pub fn connect(transport: Transport) -> Connection {
    match transport {
        Transport::Tcp => connect_tcp(),
        Transport::Udp => unimplemented!(),
        Transport::Unix => unimplemented!(),
    }
}

struct Event { kind: EventKind }
enum EventKind { Message, Error, Unknown }
enum Format { Json, Binary, Xml }
enum Transport { Tcp, Udp, Unix }
struct Connection;
fn process_message(_e: &Event) {}
fn process_error(_e: &Event) {}
fn connect_tcp() -> Connection { Connection }
